description: Phishing templates impersonating internal IT department communications

templates.name: Email Server Migration Notice
suggested_subject_lines: IT: Email server migration — account verification required
Action Required: Verify your email account after migration
IT Department: Your email may be affected by last night's maintenance

templates.name: Email Mailbox Size Limit
suggested_subject_lines: Your mailbox is almost full — action required
IT: Email storage limit reached for your account
Warning: Your email account is at 95% capacity

templates.name: Mailbox Compromised Alert
suggested_subject_lines: Security Alert: Unusual activity detected on your email account
IT Security: Your mailbox may have been compromised

templates.name: Mandatory System Update
suggested_subject_lines: IT: Mandatory system update required by end of business
Action Required: Install critical security patch
Your computer requires an immediate software update

templates.name: Webmail Upgrade Required
suggested_subject_lines: IT: Webmail upgrade requires your action
Your webmail client is being upgraded — verify your account
Action required: Complete your email upgrade by Friday

templates.name: Dropbox File Share (IT Variant)
suggested_subject_lines: IT has shared a document with you via Dropbox
You have a new file share from IT
